title: Mythical Weaponry J'Stuff
description: A mod that aims to add some cool mythical inspired weapons, armor and tools.
body:
# Mythical Weaponry - by J'Stuff


## What is included?

### Thor's Bossfight
Find the arena to fight Thor, the God of Thunder while wandering around snowy taigas. Upon defeat it will reward you an advancement for you to be able to claim the Mjölnir and a Smithing Template to craft Thor's Armor.

### Thor's Armor
You can obtain Thor's Armor after defeating Thor and obtaining its Smithing Template.

### Thor's Hammer - Mjölnir
This was the main idea that started the mod, you can throw it with Right Click and cast lightning with Shift + Right Click. Once the hammer is flying or stuck on a block you can call it by Right Clicking again and it will come to you. Take in mind that if the hammer can not reach you it will appear again in your hands after some time. If the world is closed and the hammer disappears you can get it back just by calling it and waiting.

### How to obtain Mjölnir?
The hammer appears in a new structure, you can find it in taigas and inside it a statue with a hammer will wait for you to claim Mölnir. You will only be able to claim Mjölnir if you have already defeated Thor.

Once you have claimed the hammer you can mine the statue and duplicate it so it serves as a decoration block. By right cliking the statue you can trigger the hammer to show or be hidden, this is purely costmetic.

## Everything that is in the works 


### Blacbone's Flintlock and Sword
These two other weapons are present in the mod and fully work.
